Ge egaoarser 2 SEAS QTS s, 36 WL gt B G AT 08 5 G LR Y T S 2 © 52 And do not kill the soul [i.e., person] which Allah has forbidden, except by right.' And whoever is killed unjustly - We have given his heir authority, * but let him not exceed limits in [the matter of] taking life. Indeed, he has been supported [by the law].
